response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with geospatial data through her GISCollective project, but her background lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in commercial routing/navigation systems. Her expertise in distributed systems and performance optimization is relevant, though her recent work has focused more on TypeScript and AI infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data and open-source GIS platforms (GISCollective).
Strong background in distributed systems, performance optimization, and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby media).
Proven ability to learn new technologies and adapt to diverse technical stacks (e.g., DLang, Node.js, TypeScript).
concerns: No explicit commercial experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role.
Recent work has focused on TypeScript and AI infrastructure, not routing/navigation systems.
Lack of direct experience with navigation guidance solutions or routing data pipelines.
